name: Rosehip Oil
description: A vitamin-rich oil that hydrates, brightens, and regenerates the skin.
scientificSummary: Rich in essential fatty acids (linoleic and linolenic) and Vitamin A precursors (beta-carotene), providing potent regenerative effects.
mechanismOfAction: Supports skin cell turnover and provides essential lipids to restore the skin's moisture barrier.

seo.title: Rosehip Oil - Regenerative Skin Care | Dew Theory
seo.description: Transform your skin with the vitamin-rich goodness of Rosehip Oil.
